front.title: CTP/0: Cognitive Time Protocol -- Definition and Framework

abstract.t: This document describes the Cognitive Time Protocol (CTP) family, a conceptual framework for representing and manipulating time in AI systems. The CTP family is organized into four layers: perception, direction, copy, and emergence. This document describes the terminology, the layer structure, and the relationships between layers. It does not specify wire protocols or message formats; it provides a conceptual foundation for future protocol designs and implementations.
